response.step_by_step_log: Reviewed the entire video. The video consists exclusively of spoken dialogue/banter between Hololive 3rd Generation members (Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Shiranui Flare) and an instrumental BGM track during the outro. No vocal music performances were identified in this video segment. Therefore, no lyric searches were performed.
response.global_summary: The video features a talking and banter segment with Hololive 3rd Generation members (Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Shiranui Flare) during their 3rd Generation Live concert. There is no vocal music performance, only instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Hololive 3rd Generation members (Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Shiranui Flare) engaging in banter and dialogue on stage.
Instrumental outro music playing while a still image of the members is displayed.
